summary: Completed comprehensive testing of RepNet Landing Page V3 upgrade. All backend APIs and frontend features working correctly including new V3 features: Product Showcase with 3 tabs and real screenshots, user-facing 'How It Works' 4 steps, 'Why RepNet' 6 benefit cards, pricing toggle, typing animations, and mobile responsiveness.
passed_tests: Backend - All 4 API endpoints (GET /api/, POST /api/waitlist, POST /api/contact, GET /api/waitlist/count)
Frontend - Page loads without console errors, all sections render
Hero section: typing animation in demo preview, gradient heading, floating demo card
Header scroll progress bar working (visible as blue line)
Header navigation links with smooth scrolling
Features section: 4 feature cards with spotlight hover effects
V3 Product Showcase: 3 tabs (Ask a Question, View Analytics, Manage Connections) with real product screenshots
V3 How It Works: 4 user-facing steps (Connect, Ask, Get Results, Share)
V3 Why RepNet: 6 benefit cards with stats (95%, $2K+, Any User, 100%, 24/7, 4+ ERPs)
Pricing: Monthly/Yearly toggle changes Pro price from $299 to $249
Pricing: 3 cards render (Starter, Pro with animated border, Enterprise)
Waitlist form: E2E functionality with success state and social proof counter (8 people joined)
Footer renders with 4 social links and 12 navigation links
Mobile responsive: hamburger menu works correctly, layout adapts to 390px width
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (7/7 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (15/15 V3 features tested and working)
